parsed.availability_comment: Improved from baseline: current squad listings support general availability, though no explicit fitness bulletin was found.
parsed.availability_note: 2025 injury replacement is older news; no fresh 2026 injury/suspension report found and he is listed in SRH's retained/registered 2026 squad.
parsed.followup_reason: No current adverse availability report found; only remaining uncertainty is exact batting-order pecking order, not squad availability.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Selection competition is from Indian batting depth, not overseas-slot pressure.

parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained in SRH squad, but public evidence still points to reserve domestic batter status behind established top-order options.
